allow: Bash(bash -c 'export SDKMAN_DIR="${SDKMAN_DIR:-$HOME/.sdkman}"; source "$SDKMAN_DIR/bin/sdkman-init.sh"; sdk list java 2>/dev/null | grep -i "sem.*21"')

Bash(bash -c 'export SDKMAN_DIR="${SDKMAN_DIR:-$HOME/.sdkman}"; source "$SDKMAN_DIR/bin/sdkman-init.sh"; sdk list java 2>/dev/null | grep -i "tem.*21"')
